dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3772 IS: Export-Import Bank Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Cramer (for himself and Mr. Warner) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To extend the authority of the Export-Import Bank of the United States.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Export-Import Bank Reauthorization Act of 2026.

section.header: Extension of authority of Export-Import Bank of the United States

subsection.text: Section 7 of the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 (12 U.S.C. 635f) is amended by striking 2026 and inserting 2036.

subsection.header: Aggregate loan, guarantee, and insurance authority
subsection.text: Section 6(a)(2) of the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 (12 U.S.C. 635e(a)(2)) is amended by striking 2027 and inserting 2037.

subsection.header: Program on China and Transformational Exports
subsection.text: Section 2(l)(3)(C) of the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 (12 U.S.C. 635(l)(3)(C)) is amended by striking 2026 each place it appears and inserting 2036.
